author: hanamizuki
description: Visualize AI agent skill structures in graph view. Renames SKILL.md nodes from frontmatter, draws reference edges, and colors nodes by type. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: Hana
manifest.description: Visualize AI agent skill structures in graph view. Renames SKILL.md nodes from frontmatter, draws reference edges, and colors nodes by type.
manifest.name: Agent Skill Graph

name: Agent Skill Graph

releases.author: hanamizuki
releases.description:
Resubmission release for the Obsidian community plugin directory.

Changes since 0.1.0:
- Render agent nodes (`type: agent` frontmatter) with a distinct color (#2)
- Detect skill nodes by a configurable skills folder, backward-compatible (#3)
- Fix displayName fallback for flat folder-rule skill files (#4)
- Add ESLint (eslint-plugin-obsidianmd) and address plugin-review findings: use `getLanguage()`, `createDiv()` + external CSS, tighter types (#5)
- `minAppVersion` is now 1.8.7 (required by `getLanguage()`); `versions.json` added so older installs still resolve 0.1.0

Install assets: `main.js`, `manifest.json`, `styles.css`.
